meaning: 维尔纽斯[立陶宛共和国首都]
examples: Hundreds of thousands of people have crowded into the centre of the Lithuanian capital, Vilnius.
Lithuania and Armenia signed a treaty in Vilnius recognizing each other as independent sovereign states.
The library is on the outskirts of Vilnius.
The workshop will take place at Room 6, Lithuanian Exhibition Centre LITEXPO, Vilnius, 11.30a.m.
It was written by Napoleon to Foreign Minister Hugues-Bernard Maret, who was at Vilnius in modern-day Lituania.
